fund_type: An open-ended equity investment strategy investing in listed equity and equity related instruments including limited short exposure in equity through derivative instruments.
listing_details:
As the Investment Strategy is an open ended strategy, and the units of the Investment Strategy will be offered for subscription and redemption at NAV based prices on all Business Days on an on-going basis providing the required liquidity to investors, units of the Investment Strategy are not proposed to be listed on any stock exchange.  
However, the Trustee reserves the right to list the units of the Investment Strategy on any stock exchange(s) at its sole discretion at a later date.

payout.name: Regular Plan - Payout of Income Distribution cum Capital Withdrawal Option

reinvestment.name: Regular Plan - Reinvestment of Income Distribution cum Capital Withdrawal Option

payout.name: Direct Plan - Payout of Income Distribution cum Capital Withdrawal (IDCW) Option

reinvestment.name: Direct Plan - Reinvestment of IDCW Option

fund_managers.name: FM 1 - Mr.Rajesh Aynor, FM 2 - Mr.Hiten Bhadra(for Arbitrage portion)

exit_load: 1% if redeemed or switched out on or before completion of 1 year from the date of allotment of units. Nil if redeemed or switched out after completion of 1 year from the date of allotment of units.
